cases.name: for loop basics: for loop with list
cases.script: for i in a b c; do echo $i; done

cases.name: for loop basics: for loop with range
cases.script: for i in {1..3}; do echo $i; done

cases.name: for loop basics: for loop with quoted string
cases.script: for i in 'a b' c; do echo "[$i]"; done

cases.name: for loop basics: for loop with variable
cases.script: items='x y z'; for i in $items; do echo $i; done

cases.name: for loop basics: for loop empty list
cases.script: for i in; do echo $i; done; echo done

cases.name: for loop basics: for loop single item
cases.script: for i in only; do echo $i; done

cases.name: for loop basics: for loop with glob pattern
cases.script:
mkdir -p /tmp/fortest
touch /tmp/fortest/a.txt /tmp/fortest/b.txt
for f in /tmp/fortest/*.txt; do basename $f; done | sort

cases.name: while loop: basic while
cases.script: x=3; while [ $x -gt 0 ]; do echo $x; x=$((x-1)); done

cases.name: while loop: while with false condition
cases.script: while false; do echo never; done; echo done

cases.name: while loop: while count up
cases.script: x=0; while [ $x -lt 3 ]; do echo $x; x=$((x+1)); done

cases.name: while loop: while with command condition
cases.script: x=0; while test $x -lt 2; do echo $x; x=$((x+1)); done

cases.name: until loop: basic until
cases.script: x=0; until [ $x -ge 3 ]; do echo $x; x=$((x+1)); done

cases.name: until loop: until with true condition
cases.script: until true; do echo never; done; echo done

cases.name: until loop: until count down
cases.script: x=3; until [ $x -eq 0 ]; do echo $x; x=$((x-1)); done

cases.name: break statement: break in for loop
cases.script: for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do if [ $i -eq 3 ]; then break; fi; echo $i; done

cases.name: break statement: break in while loop
cases.script: x=0; while true; do x=$((x+1)); if [ $x -ge 3 ]; then break; fi; echo $x; done

cases.name: break statement: break with level 1
cases.script: for i in 1 2 3; do if [ $i -eq 2 ]; then break 1; fi; echo $i; done

cases.name: break statement: break with level 2 in nested loops
cases.script:
for i in 1 2; do
  for j in a b c; do
    if [ "$j" = "b" ]; then break 2; fi
    echo "$i$j"
  done
  echo "inner done"
done
echo "outer done"

cases.name: break statement: break only inner loop
cases.script:
for i in 1 2; do
  for j in a b c; do
    if [ "$j" = "b" ]; then break; fi
    echo "$i$j"
  done
  echo "i=$i done"
done

cases.name: continue statement: continue in for loop
cases.script: for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do if [ $i -eq 3 ]; then continue; fi; echo $i; done

cases.name: continue statement: continue in while loop
cases.script: x=0; while [ $x -lt 5 ]; do x=$((x+1)); if [ $x -eq 3 ]; then continue; fi; echo $x; done

cases.name: continue statement: continue with level 1
cases.script: for i in 1 2 3; do if [ $i -eq 2 ]; then continue 1; fi; echo $i; done

cases.name: continue statement: continue with level 2 in nested loops
cases.script:
for i in 1 2 3; do
  echo "i=$i start"
  for j in a b c; do
    if [ "$j" = "b" ]; then continue 2; fi
    echo "$i$j"
  done
  echo "i=$i end"
done

cases.name: if statements: if true
cases.script: if true; then echo yes; fi

cases.name: if statements: if false with else
cases.script: if false; then echo yes; else echo no; fi

cases.name: if statements: if elif else
cases.script: x=2; if [ $x -eq 1 ]; then echo one; elif [ $x -eq 2 ]; then echo two; else echo other; fi

cases.name: if statements: multiple elif
cases.script: x=3; if [ $x -eq 1 ]; then echo 1; elif [ $x -eq 2 ]; then echo 2; elif [ $x -eq 3 ]; then echo 3; else echo x; fi

cases.name: if statements: nested if
cases.script: x=1; y=2; if [ $x -eq 1 ]; then if [ $y -eq 2 ]; then echo both; fi; fi

cases.name: if statements: if with command
cases.script: if echo test >/dev/null; then echo ok; fi

cases.name: if statements: if with negation
cases.script: if ! false; then echo not false; fi

cases.name: case statement: simple case
cases.script: x=b; case $x in a) echo A;; b) echo B;; esac

cases.name: case statement: case with default
cases.script: x=z; case $x in a) echo A;; b) echo B;; *) echo default;; esac

cases.name: case statement: case with pattern
cases.script: x=hello; case $x in h*) echo starts with h;; *) echo other;; esac

cases.name: case statement: case with multiple patterns
cases.script: x=y; case $x in a|b|c) echo abc;; x|y|z) echo xyz;; esac

cases.name: case statement: case with bracket pattern
cases.script: x=test; case $x in [tT]*) echo starts with t;; esac

cases.name: case statement: case empty match
cases.script: x=''; case $x in '') echo empty;; *) echo not empty;; esac

cases.name: case statement: case no match
cases.script: x=nomatch; case $x in a) echo A;; b) echo B;; esac; echo done

cases.name: case statement: case with question mark
cases.script: x=ab; case $x in a?) echo 'a + one char';; *) echo other;; esac

cases.name: compound commands: command list with semicolons
cases.script: echo a; echo b; echo c

cases.name: compound commands: command list with &&
cases.script: true && echo success

cases.name: compound commands: command list with || (short circuit)
cases.script: true || echo should not print

cases.name: compound commands: command list with || (fallback)
cases.script: false || echo fallback

cases.name: compound commands: combined && and ||
cases.script: true && echo yes || echo no

cases.name: compound commands: combined && and || with false
cases.script: false && echo yes || echo no

cases.name: compound commands: subshell
cases.script: (echo in subshell; x=1); echo $x

cases.name: compound commands: command group
cases.script: { echo a; echo b; }

cases.name: exit codes: successful command
cases.script: true; echo $?

cases.name: exit codes: failed command
cases.script: false; echo $?

cases.name: exit codes: last command in pipeline
cases.script: true | false; echo $?

cases.name: exit codes: custom exit code
cases.script: (exit 42); echo $?
